description_long: This is a low-top sneaker featuring a blue fabric upper with a subtle woven texture, complemented by white laces and a white rubber sole. The shoe has a rounded toe and a gently contoured silhouette, providing a casual yet modern appearance. The lacing system is standard, with eyelets running up the front and white laces tied in a bow. The heel and collar are softly padded for comfort, and the sole appears to be flat with a slightly textured finish for grip. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior. The overall design is clean and versatile, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A blue fabric low-top sneaker with white laces and a white rubber sole, featuring a clean, modern design and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, white laces, and the symmetrical shape of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue fabric upper, white sole, and the full length of the lacing system.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded heel and collar, as well as the back seam of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the blue upper, white sole, and laces from a slightly different angle.
